patterns/AppShellHeader.astro.rationale: Application top bar built from daisyUI navigation and action primitives; Storybook documents structure, apps/design validates behavior.

patterns/AppShellSidebar.astro.rationale: Application sidebar shell with product navigation state; Storybook documents structure, apps/design validates behavior.

patterns/BackupHistoryWidget.astro.rationale: Backup history accordion composed from daisyUI badge, stats, alert, and button primitives.

patterns/BackupPipeline.astro.rationale: Product-specific Source to Bases to Destination pipeline, backed by Badge primitives.

patterns/BaseSelectionTable.astro.rationale: Large Airtable base selection table composed from daisyUI checkbox, input, and pagination controls.

patterns/DefinitionList.astro.rationale: Entity detail pages repeat the same term/value metadata layout.

patterns/EntityDetailHeader.astro.rationale: Product detail header composing PageHeader, Badge, and action controls.

patterns/FrequencyPicker.astro.rationale: Backup frequency selection built from daisyUI radio controls.

patterns/MetaBlock.astro.rationale: Backup run KPI/meta blocks with mono tabular numbers.

patterns/RegistryTable.astro.rationale: Dense registry row/grid composition for Sources and Destinations lists.

patterns/RunBackupButton.astro.rationale: Manual backup CTA built from daisyUI Button plus loading and error states.

patterns/SelectableConnectorRow.astro.rationale: Selectable provider rows with status badges and radio/checkbox controls.

patterns/SpacePipelineHero.astro.rationale: Unconfigured Space pipeline hero composing Button and brand marks.

patterns/StoragePicker.astro.rationale: Storage destination selection built from daisyUI radio, alert, and button controls.

patterns/WizardStepper.astro.rationale: Setup flow stepper chrome for gated wizard surfaces.

ui/Alert.astro.rationale: Reusable inline notice primitive backed by daisyUI soft alert classes.

ui/Avatar.astro.rationale: Reusable identity primitive backed by daisyUI avatar classes.

ui/BackLink.astro.rationale: Reusable back navigation affordance for detail and setup pages.

ui/Badge.astro.rationale: Reusable status/count primitive backed by daisyUI badge classes.

ui/Breadcrumbs.astro.rationale: Reusable drill-down navigation primitive backed by daisyUI breadcrumbs.

ui/Button.astro.rationale: Primary action primitive backed by daisyUI button classes.

ui/Card.astro.rationale: Reusable surface primitive backed by daisyUI card styling.

ui/Checkbox.astro.rationale: Reusable boolean input primitive backed by daisyUI checkbox styling.

ui/CreateSpaceModal.astro.rationale: Behavior-bearing modal composed from daisyUI dialog, Button, and TextInput; Storybook documents structure and apps/design validates behavior.

ui/Divider.astro.rationale: Reusable separator primitive backed by daisyUI divider classes.

ui/EmptyState.astro.rationale: Reusable empty/no-match state primitive for registries and setup screens.

ui/Modal.astro.rationale: Reusable dialog primitive backed by daisyUI modal/dialog markup.

ui/PageHeader.astro.rationale: Reusable page title, metadata, and action cluster primitive.

ui/ProgressBar.astro.rationale: Reusable progress/quota primitive backed by daisyUI progress classes.

ui/SectionPanel.astro.rationale: Reusable section surface for repeated bordered panels.

ui/Select.astro.rationale: Reusable select primitive backed by daisyUI select classes.

ui/Tabs.astro.rationale: Reusable in-page tab primitive backed by daisyUI tabs.

ui/TextInput.astro.rationale: Reusable text field primitive backed by daisyUI input/fieldset patterns.

ui/Toggle.astro.rationale: Reusable boolean switch primitive backed by daisyUI toggle styling.
